title: Crash And Burn - The Steven Seagal Story
description: He was once hailed as the next big action star. The man who would take Hollywood into the next decade. Then it all fell apart in an implosion of box office disasters, inflated egos, even more inflated waistlines, assault allegations and some very sketchy business connections. Join me as I examine the story of The Great One himself - Steven Seagal.
